title: trampoline block
description: that is a trampoline block mod
body:
this is a mod that add a trampoline block that make you jump when you walk on it




Here is how to craft it:

![craft of the trampoline](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c776c51fc6a57eba8e435dfe6832f116a4821d3.png)


**_(the way that the wool block are place doesn't matter)_**



If you play in creative, the block will be in the Functional block tab
